mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE FolderTree AS (
SELECT id, drive_id, user_id, parent_id, storage_id, entry_name, entry_type, file_size, file_ext, status, deleter_id, deleted_at, expired_at, created_at FROM file_entry WHERE parent_id IN
#{id}
UNION ALL
SELECT e.id, e.drive_id, e.user_id, e.parent_id, e.storage_id, e.entry_name, e.entry_type, e.file_size, e.file_ext, e.status, e.deleter_id, e.deleted_at, e.expired_at, e.created_at FROM file_entry e INNER JOIN FolderTree ft ON e.parent_id = ft.id WHERE e.status = 1 -- 确保只查询未删除的文件 )
SELECT id, drive_id, user_id, parent_id, storage_id, entry_name, entry_type, file_size, file_ext, status, deleter_id, deleted_at, expired_at, created_at FROM FolderTree

SELECT category, SUM(file_size) AS totalSize FROM ( SELECT file_size, -- 核心逻辑：根据后缀名进行分类 CASE WHEN LOWER(file_ext) IN ('doc', 'docx', 'xls', 'xlsx', 'ppt', 'pptx', 'pdf', 'txt', 'md') THEN '文档' WHEN LOWER(file_ext) IN ('jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'bmp', 'svg', 'webp', 'ico') THEN '图像' WHEN LOWER(file_ext) IN ('mp4', 'avi', 'mov', 'wmv', 'mkv', 'flv', 'webm') THEN '视频' WHEN LOWER(file_ext) IN ('mp3', 'wav', 'flac', 'aac', 'ogg', 'wma') THEN '音频' ELSE '其他' END AS category FROM file_entry WHERE entry_type = 1 -- 只统计文件，排除文件夹 AND status = 1 -- 只统计未删除的文件 ) AS categorized_files GROUP BY category
